おや。司令官、いいものを飲んでいるな。いい香りのコーヒーではないか。<br>どれ:
Oh? Commander, that's a nice drink you've got there. That coffee
smells great, doesn't it? Here, let me have a sip... Guh!
に、苦っ！ ……ちょ、ちょっと待ってくれ！<br>なんでこのコーヒー、ミルクも砂:
Guh, bitter! ...H-hey, hold on a second! Why does this coffee have no
milk or sugar?
いやいや、お子様扱いはするでない！<br>優れた頭脳活動には糖分が必要だろうが！:
No, no! Don't treat me like a child! Excellent brainwork requires
sugar, doesn't it!
司令官も頭を使う仕事だろう？<br>ちゃんと糖分を摂るようにしたらどうなんだ？:
Commander, your work also requires brainpower, doesn't it? Why
don't you make sure to get some sugar?
……と、いうわけで私の分のコーヒーを淹れなおしてくれ。<br>ちゃんと砂糖とミル:
...So that's why: brew me a fresh coffee. And make sure to add plenty
of sugar and milk, okay?♪
